title: Egyptian Noodle Fritters
description: Crispy fritters filled with a flavorful egg and noodle mixture, inspired by Egyptian cuisine. Serve with your favorite dipping sauce.
instructions: 1. Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, salt, and black pepper.
3. Add the chopped noodles and mix well.
4. Cut the flaky pastry into small pieces and add to the bowl.
5. Mix until the pastry is evenly distributed.
6. Using a spoon, drop small amounts of the mixture into the hot oil.
7. Fry the fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
8. Remove the fritters from the oil and place on paper towels to drain excess oil.
9. Serve the fritters hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
